destination.name: Bordeaux
destination.blurb: The world's most storied fine-wine region, from Medoc first-growths to Pomerol micro-estates and Sauternes liquid gold.
destination.tagline: Left Bank gravels, Right Bank clay, one world-class appellation
destination.overview: Bordeaux spans 120,000 hectares across 57 appellations, producing reds dominated by Cabernet Sauvignon on the Left Bank and Merlot on the Right, plus legendary Sauternes dessert wines.
destination.hero_image_credit: Photo by Angell Guillén on Unsplash
destination.hero_image_alt: Bordeaux vineyard landscape with a church in the background

index.title: Bordeaux Wine Region Guide | Cork & Curve
index.description: Explore Bordeaux wine estates, appellations, tasting rooms, and iconic cuvees from Medoc first-growths to Pomerol, Saint-Emilion and Sauternes.

vineyards.title: Bordeaux Vineyards and Chateaux | Cork & Curve
vineyards.description: Discover Bordeaux chateaux from Medoc first-growths to Right Bank estates. Tastings, addresses, and production details for 45 top producers.

wines.title: Bordeaux Wines Catalog | Cork & Curve
wines.description: Browse every Bordeaux cuvee from grand vins to second wines. Taste profiles, food pairings, history and vintage scores across 100+ Bordeaux bottles.

tasting-rooms.title: Bordeaux Tasting Rooms | Cork & Curve
tasting-rooms.description: The Bordeaux tasting rooms worth booking, from urban CIVB and L'Intendant pours to appointment-only chateau cellars across every appellation.

wine-bars.title: Bordeaux Wine Bars | Cork & Curve
wine-bars.description: Best Bordeaux wine bars with curated by-the-glass lists, natural wine selections, and sommelier-led pours across the city centre, Chartrons and beyond.
